name: Sosiani River Riparian Enforcement
blocking_factor: Dense informal settlement on riparian land — enforcement requires evictions
notes: 30m buffer consistently violated in Langas and Huruma. County has not issued demolition orders since 2020.

name: Eldoret Stormwater Master Plan
blocking_factor: French Development Agency conditions not met for disbursement
notes: AFD-funded plan developed 2019. Disbursement conditions include financial management reforms not completed. 4 years of delayed implementation.

name: Sosiani River Early Warning
blocking_factor: Alert chain to informal settlement communities
notes: 5 gauges installed. 4-hour warning achievable. Sub-chief network used for alerts — misses renters and new arrivals in Langas.

name: JKUAT-Eldoret Flood Risk Research Partnership
notes: Academic risk mapping complete. Peer-reviewed 2022. Not integrated into county planning approvals process.

name: Eldoret Northern Bypass Drainage
notes: Bypass built 2021. Three undersized culverts identified in 2022 floods. Remediation design underway.
